вң… Local MCP server and CLI
вң… Auto-discovery of APIs from browser traffic
вң… Generates reusable API interfaces (skills) on the fly
вң… Significantly faster and cheaper than traditional browser flows
вң… Shared marketplace for learned API contracts
вң… Security focused: capture and execution stay local by default
вң… Drop-in replacement for OpenClaw / agent-browser flows

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Unbrowse is a local Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and CLI that transforms websites into reusable API interfaces for agents. It captures network traffic, reverse-engineers API endpoints, and stores learned information in a marketplace for instant reuse, significantly improving agent efficiency and reducing costs.

taskt is a free and open-source Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tool built with C# and the .NET Framework. It allows users to design and build automation scripts without extensive coding, featuring a visual bot designer, element recorder, and screen recorder.

Bluehood is a Python-based project that monitors and analyzes Bluetooth activity in a local neighborhood. It identifies and classifies nearby Bluetooth devices, tracks their presence patterns over time, and provides a web dashboard for visualization and analysis, aiming to raise awareness about Bluetooth privacy risks.

Scientific Agent Skills provides a comprehensive collection of 138 pre-built skills for AI agents, enabling them to perform complex scientific and research workflows across various domains like bioinformatics, drug discovery, and materials science. These skills adhere to the open Agent Skills standard, ensuring broad compatibility with different AI agent frameworks.

Sub2API is an open-source AI API gateway platform that centralizes access to various AI services like Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini. It allows users to share subscription quotas, manage API keys, and handle authentication, billing, and request forwarding, making AI service access more efficient and cost-effective.

Superset is a desktop application designed to orchestrate and manage multiple AI coding agents, such as Claude Code and Codex, in parallel. It provides a unified interface for running these agents on local development tasks, isolating each agent's work in separate git worktrees for better organization and preventing interference.
